name: ancient-ruin-overgrown
summary: The remnants of a building the forest has reclaimed. Toppled columns, a cracked floor mosaic under moss, a tree growing through a wall. The plants are winning.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: irregular — a former rectangle blurred by collapse

primary_palette.note: pair of broken columns marking a vanished doorway — tree grown between
overgrown altar or dais at the ruin's center
a great tree has grown through the ruin — its roots cracking the floor
face-down statue, its identity lost — the ruin's mute protagonist

story_prompts: forgotten, truly — no one has visited in generations, the forest is the sole tenant
scholars are here — a half-mapped dig, a tent in the ruin, notes nailed to a column
a cult uses the altar — fresh offerings, ritual chalk, someone comes here at night
the ruin is a doorway — something sleeps in the foundation and is about to wake
treasure hunters ransacked it last year — the good stuff is gone, the curse isn't

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dappled forest — broken roof admits sky, shaded under canopy

anti_patterns: do not enclose fully — at least one full side should be broken-open to the forest
walls in this room are short, partial, ivy-covered — never pristine
plants grow THROUGH things, not beside them — trees inside former rooms, ferns in cracks
mosaic/floor pattern visible only in patches — moss and dirt cover the rest
